message:
test(integration): add 32 integration tests for agent detection pipeline (ft-dr6zv.2.5)

Validates the full detection-to-inventory flow: pattern/title/process
detection, state transitions, priority enforcement, cross-pane isolation,
serde roundtrip stability, inventory assembly, and E2E swarm scenarios
with heterogeneous agent fleets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
